title: SoulGuard: A Data-Driven Approach to Preventing Depression-Induced Suicide Through Social Media Analysis
text:
Suicides are a global crisis, with over 700,000 lives lost annually. Root causes include social isolation, financial distress, relationship struggles, and mental health disorders, with depression as a leading contributor. Depression often leaves individuals feeling hopeless and emotionally overwhelmed, and societal stigma or lack of resources prevents many from seeking help in time.
Depression is a mental health condition marked by persistent sadness, loss of interest, and fatigue. Research including the seminal studies by Beck and colleagues, highlights a strong link between depression and suicide, as untreated depression can lead to suicidal ideation due to feelings of hopelessness. Addressing this connection is crucial to preventing tragedies.
Soul Guard addresses this by leveraging AI to analyze social media and user input, detecting depression indicators and differentiating between general symptoms and suicide risks. With its dual-user model—“For You” and “For Whom You Care”—the app provides tailored interventions, emotional tracking, and direct access to resources, empowering users to take proactive steps and save lives.

title: SoulGuard: A Data-Driven Approach to Preventing Depression-Induced Suicide Through Social Media Analysis
text:
Market Research
The global mental health solutions market is expanding rapidly, projected to reach $10 billion by 2026, driven by rising awareness and demand for innovative tools. This includes apps, teletherapy services, and suicide prevention platforms, highlighting the urgent need for effective solutions, particularly as suicide rates rise among younger populations.

Existing competitors offer features like self-care techniques and mental health tracking but often lack real-time detection and personalized interventions. Soul Guard differentiates itself by addressing these gaps, providing tailored insights and proactive support that many current applications do not offer.

title: SoulGuard: A Data-Driven Approach to Preventing Depression-Induced Suicide Through Social Media Analysis
section: Why SoulGuard & How The App Helps
text:
Why SoulGuard & How The App Helps
Soul Guard is a cutting-edge mental health app that bridges gaps in existing solutions by offering dual-user functionality, real-time analysis, and tailored interventions. Unlike traditional tools, it leverages advanced AI and deep learning to analyze social media activity, distinguishing between general depressive symptoms and suicide risks.
This app proactively supports mental well-being by providing real-time insights, personalized recommendations, and actionable strategies, empowering users to monitor emotional health, connect with support, and assist loved ones.

Demonstration Video: See How Soul Guard Works

title: About
text:
The project SoulGuard was developed for INFO 698 - Capstone Project at the University of Arizona, under the guidance of Dr. Greg Chism. The team is composed of the following team members:

title: How the App is Built
text:
2. Backend Models Overview
To deliver accurate and insightful results, our backend leverages advanced machine learning models and natural language processing techniques. The workflow includes:

Data Cleaning to ensure robust preprocessing of raw text data.


Word Cloud visualization to highlight key themes from the dataset.


Topic Analysis using Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) to extract hidden topics.







BiLSTM Model Comparisons to evaluate deep learning performance in text classification tasks.

LiME Comparisons to interpret and validate model predictions on sample sentences, enhancing trust and explainability.


Suicide Model Update: Boosting Accuracy with Hyperparameter Tuning and Regularization
The Suicide Model was updated through hyperparameter tuning to optimize performance, using the best parameters identified to enhance model accuracy by 1.5%. L2 regularization was applied to mitigate overfitting, ensuring the model generalized well to new data while maintaining improved accuracy.
